menu.subtitle: Grow a ring of spinning blades, crush the horde, out-duel rival heroes.
menu.controls: Move to aim — your blades strike automatically

gates.label: Collect swords
gates.text: Run gates — +N and ×N grow your ring

swords.label: Spin & slay
swords.text: Orbiting blades shred anything near you

rivals.label: Duel rivals
rivals.text: Out-number rival heroes, or get wiped

changelog.title: What's New
changelog.subtitle: Every update to Blade Rush, newest first.

mode.label: Mode
mode.normalDesc: Survive the horde; Boss Rush unlocks at Lvl 10.
mode.endlessDesc: Pure endless survival — no Boss Rush.
mode.bossrushDesc: Face waves of bosses from the very start.
mode.timeattackDesc: Score as high as you can in 5 minutes.

guide.title: How to Play
guide.subtitle: Everything you need to master Blade Rush — read top to bottom.
guide.rarityNote: Each tier looks fiercer than the last. Reach Divine (top 10 heroes) to unlock a unique 4th ultimate.

loop.title: The core loop
loop.desc: Move, let your blades work, grow — then repeat.

move.d: Drag the screen, move the mouse, or use WASD / arrow keys to steer your hero.

auto.d: Your spinning ring of blades shreds nearby enemies automatically — no shooting needed.

kill.d: Every kill grants score, power, and XP all at once.

grow.d: Spend gates to add blades, then repeat — a bigger ring means a deadlier hero.

power.title: Power & gates
power.desc: Gates are how you scale. Chase them constantly.

plus.d: Run through it to ADD N blades to your ring.

times.d: MULTIPLIES your blade count — always aim for the big one.

ring.d: More power = more blades, faster spin, wider reach.

dmg.d: Power also raises each blade's damage. A large ring = a strong hero.

level.title: Leveling up
level.desc: Kills fuel XP; each level lets you build your run.

xp.d: Kills (+1) and bosses (+8) fill the XP bar under your health.

up.d: When the bar fills, you level up and the game pauses for a choice.

choose.d: Pick 1 of 3: sword damage, extra blades, spin speed, lifesteal, burn / frost / venom, HP, and more.

stack.d: Upgrades stack across the whole run — craft your favorite combo.

hero.title: Hero evolution & transform
hero.desc: Your hero visibly transforms as your score climbs.

score.d: The higher your score, the more your hero gradually transforms into fiercer forms.

loadout.d: Open the Codex and tap any discovered hero to start as it every run.

auto.d: Without a pick you start humble and evolve automatically with your score.

skills.title: Skills & ultimate
skills.desc: Tap a skill button in the HUD; each has a cooldown.

fury.d: A burst of spin speed — shred everything faster for a moment.

nova.d: A ring of force blasts outward, damaging every enemy around you.

dash.d: Lunge quickly to escape a swarm or dodge a boss attack.

divine.d: Divine-tier heroes unlock a devastating, one-of-a-kind 4th skill.

boss.title: Bosses & Boss Rush
boss.desc: Milestone fights — and the endgame gauntlet.

spawn.d: Periodically a giant boss appears with meteor and projectile attacks.

beat.d: A downed boss drops big score + an epic chest. A red arrow points to it off-screen.

rush.d: At level 10 the horde stops — bosses arrive in waves: one lead boss plus escorts.

waves.d: Starts at 5 bosses, +1 every 2 waves (max 10), and +20% HP each wave cleared.

world.title: The battlefield
world.desc: You share a big open world with rivals and hazards.

npc.d: Rival heroes roam and fight too. Out-duel or absorb them to grow.

rank.d: A leaderboard shows your rank (#) among every hero in the world.

obstacle.d: Boulders and pillars block movement — use them to break line of sight.

heart.d: Grab hearts to heal; open chests for power bonuses.

tips.title: Quick tips
tips.t1: Always chase ×N gates — multiplying beats adding.
tips.t2: Keep moving; a stationary hero gets surrounded.
tips.t3: Save your dash for boss meteors and dense swarms.
tips.t4: Grab hearts before you're critical, not after.

codex.title: Codex
codex.selectHint: Tap to play as it · tap again for Auto · tap a locked one to unlock with 💰

burn.name: Ignite
burn.text: Blades set enemies on fire (burn damage)

prestige.none: Reset your shop for permanent power

ms.relic: Start each run with a relic

startPower.name: Warmup
startPower.text: Start each run with more swords

lifesteal.name: Vampirism
lifesteal.text: Start with +1 HP healed per kill

magnet.name: Magnet
magnet.text: Pull gates & hearts from farther away

revive.name: Second Wind
revive.text: Survive a lethal hit (once per level)
